description: Don that sporty look with ease with this white tennis cap from nike. Made of Dri-Fit fabric, this cap ensures your head is absolutely sweat-free all day long. The black piping along the edges and a classy nike Swoosh symbol motivates you to follow Nike's advice and 'Just Do It'! This cap is an ideal choice as a cool sportswear accessory and a classy leisurewear option. White cap made of Dri-Fit fabric Mesh fabric between panels Stiff black lining along the cap and visor hem Adjustable velcro back strap Nike swoosh logo embroidered on the front Care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not use softeners or bleach Tumble dry on low Cool iron Do not iron on design Do not dry clean
